title: Pets, Estrogen, and More
description: This mod adds some new tamable mobs, ore, items, armor ,tools, potions, and potion effects.
body:
This adds some new tamable mobs, ore, items, armor ,tools, potions, and potion effects.
3 new mobs (2 naturally spawning):
- Guinea Pigs
- Cappybara
- Pet Goat ( not naturallly spawning and broken animations)
1 new ore 
3 new Items used for crafting:
- petmuim crystal
- silly crystal
- estrogen
1 new armor set
1 new tool set
3 new potions:
- silly juice
- shark juice
- estrogen
2 new custom potion effects:
- shark 
- estrogen
